title: Start by connecting an account
alt: Brows3 dark mode welcome screen prompting the user to connect an S3 account or S3-compatible storage provider

title: Open cloud profile setup
alt: Cloud Profiles dialog in dark mode with an empty state and Create New Profile button

title: Add AWS or S3-compatible storage
alt: New Cloud Connection form showing Custom S3 compatibility mode with endpoint URL, access key, secret key, and default region fields

title: Jump directly to any S3 path
alt: Brows3 direct access screen with an S3 URI input for opening a bucket or prefix

title: Browse all buckets
alt: All Buckets view listing S3 buckets with region, creation date, and total size columns

title: Explore a bucket root
alt: Bucket object browser showing root folders and files in a virtualized table

title: Manage folders and objects
alt: Folder object browser with search, deep search, new folder, upload, preview, edit, and object action controls

title: Search within the current folder
alt: Object browser filtered by a search query to find JSON files in the current S3 folder

title: Track uploads
alt: Uploads page showing active, pending, and completed upload transfer jobs

title: Track downloads
alt: Downloads page showing active and completed download transfer jobs with progress

title: Tune settings and updates
alt: Settings page with theme, default region, transfer concurrency, cache clearing, update checks, and system monitor

title: Manage saved profiles
alt: Cloud Profiles dialog showing an active S3-compatible profile and profile management actions
